description: Change management process for production system changes. Change request workflows, approval processes, testing requirements, rollback procedures.

subcriteria.name: change_request_process
subcriteria.reference_text: Formal change request and approval process. Pull requests, code reviews, and required approvals before deployment to production.

subcriteria.name: testing_requirements
subcriteria.reference_text: Automated testing requirements before deployment. CI/CD pipeline with test gates. Staging environment testing before production release.

subcriteria.name: rollback_procedures
subcriteria.reference_text: Rollback and recovery procedures for failed deployments. Ability to revert changes quickly with documented steps.

subcriteria.name: approval_workflow
subcriteria.reference_text: Required approvals before changes are deployed. At least one reviewer required for pull requests. Change advisory board or equivalent for major changes.

mismatch_signals.reason: Raw commit history shows changes occurred but no review or approval process.
Document indicates single-developer changes with no review process.
